name: auto-refresh: successful refresh updates .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/<source-id>.txt to the new timestamp
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --source-id x --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" && grep "2026-05-13" .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
